usagePrompt: Blockfill execution module. Adds a TWAP / Maker-Taker order-entry panel to the order form that routes orders to the blockfill execution engine (smart order execution over Orderly). Install: add this package to your app and pass registerBlockfillExec() to OrderlyAppProvider's `plugins` prop. Config: set globalThis.BLOCKFILL_SERVER_URL to the blockfill-server endpoint; the plugin auto-detects the active symbol and account from the Orderly SDK context. No broker configuration required.
